rationale: Romania's Liberal former mayor nominated as PM is a fresh domestic political development directly affecting governance and daily life for Romanian residents.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: A new prime ministerial candidate has been nominated in Romania, moving the country closer to resolving its prolonged government formation crisis. This directly affects Romanians' daily lives through policy continuity and EU fund access.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could ease global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Romanian households facing high energy costs. Outcome remains uncertain.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker
top_events.summary: Tighter enforcement of Russia sanctions in European waters is a modest positive for Black Sea regional security, relevant to Romania's strategic position.
